curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #19 (melanger/fixSQLinjection) into master. The single source file changed is lib/Auth/Process/DatabaseCommand.php, where 9 methods directly interpolated user-controlled values (entity identifiers, service names, day interval parameters) into SQL query strings. The fix replaces all string interpolations with parameterized prepared statements using bind_param(). No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern; DatabaseConnector.php only handles connection setup and statistics.php is the SimpleSAML auth processing filter. The pre-assigned class sql-injection is correct per CWE-89 and the patch content.
